data.title: Lyran Commonwealth Reinforces Skye
data.description: The Lyran Commonwealth dispatches additional regiments to the Skye region following increased border tensions with the Draconis Combine.

data.title: Capellan Forces Capture Northwind
data.description: Capellan Confederation forces launch a surprise offensive and seize control of Northwind from Federated Commonwealth garrisons.

data.title: Mercenary Review Board Establishes Galatea Headquarters
data.description: The Mercenary Review Board formally establishes its central headquarters on Galatea, codifying mercenary contracts across the Inner Sphere.

data.title: Free Worlds League Diplomatic Summit
data.description: The Free Worlds League hosts a diplomatic summit on Atreus, attempting to negotiate trade agreements with bordering states.

data.title: Pirate Raid on Antallos
data.description: Independent pirate forces overwhelm the decrepit garrison on Antallos, establishing Port Krin as a pirate haven.
